subcodes.first_line: O 'Andalib! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The letter of that noble one, which was previously addressed in the name of Júd - upon him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عندلیب علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه آنجناب که از قبل باسم جود علیه بهائی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
